mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.equipment_id, e.equipment_name, e.equipment_number, e.equipment_model, e.equipment_image, et.type_name as equipment_type, r.user_id, u.real_name as user_name, u.phone as user_phone, r.reserve_time, r.reserve_duration, r.purpose, r.reserve_status, r.audit_status, r.audit_user_id, au.real_name as audit_user_name, r.audit_time, r.audit_result, r.create_time, r.update_time, r.is_extension FROM equipment_reservation r LEFT JOIN equipment e ON r.equipment_id = e.id LEFT JOIN equipment_type et ON e.equipment_type_id = et.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON r.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN sys_user au ON r.audit_user_id = au.id WHERE r.id = #{id}

SELECT r.id, r.equipment_id, r.equipment_name, r.equipment_number, COALESCE(r.equipment_model, e.equipment_model) AS equipment_model, COALESCE(r.equipment_image, e.equipment_image) AS equipment_image, et.type_name AS equipment_type, r.user_id, u.real_name AS user_name, u.phone AS user_phone, r.reserve_time, r.reserve_duration, r.purpose, r.reserve_status, r.audit_status, r.audit_user_id, ru.real_name AS audit_user_name, r.audit_time, r.audit_result, r.create_time, r.update_time, r.is_extension, e.available_quantity FROM equipment_reservation r LEFT JOIN equipment e ON r.equipment_id = e.id LEFT JOIN equipment_type et ON e.equipment_type_id = et.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON r.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN sys_user ru ON r.audit_user_id = ru.id
AND (r.equipment_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR r.equipment_number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND r.reserve_status = 1 AND DATE_ADD(r.reserve_time, INTERVAL r.reserve_duration HOUR) > NOW()
AND r.reserve_status = 1 AND DATE_ADD(r.reserve_time, INTERVAL r.reserve_duration HOUR) < NOW()
AND r.reserve_status = #{status}
AND r.audit_status = #{auditStatus}
ORDER BY r.create_time DESC

SELECT r.id, r.equipment_id, r.equipment_name, r.equipment_number, COALESCE(r.equipment_model, e.equipment_model) AS equipment_model, COALESCE(r.equipment_image, e.equipment_image) AS equipment_image, et.type_name AS equipment_type, r.user_id, u.real_name AS user_name, r.reserve_time, r.reserve_duration, r.purpose, r.reserve_status, r.audit_status, r.audit_user_id, ru.real_name AS audit_user_name, r.audit_time, r.audit_result, r.create_time, r.update_time, r.is_extension, e.available_quantity, IF((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM equipment_borrow b WHERE b.reserve_id = r.id AND b.borrow_status = 1 AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM equipment_return er WHERE er.borrow_id = b.id AND er.return_status = 1)) > 0, 1, 0) AS has_borrow FROM equipment_reservation r LEFT JOIN equipment e ON r.equipment_id = e.id LEFT JOIN equipment_type et ON e.equipment_type_id = et.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON r.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN sys_user ru ON r.audit_user_id = ru.id
r.user_id = #{userId}
AND (r.equipment_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR r.equipment_number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND r.reserve_status = 1 AND DATE_ADD(r.reserve_time, INTERVAL r.reserve_duration HOUR) > NOW()
AND r.reserve_status = 1 AND DATE_ADD(r.reserve_time, INTERVAL r.reserve_duration HOUR) < NOW()
AND r.reserve_status = #{status}
ORDER BY r.create_time DESC

SELECT r.id, r.equipment_id, r.equipment_name, r.equipment_number, COALESCE(r.equipment_model, e.equipment_model) AS equipment_model, COALESCE(r.equipment_image, e.equipment_image) AS equipment_image, et.type_name AS equipment_type, r.user_id, u.real_name AS user_name, u.phone AS user_phone, r.reserve_time, r.reserve_duration, r.purpose, r.reserve_status, r.audit_status, r.audit_user_id, ru.real_name AS audit_user_name, r.audit_time, r.audit_result, r.create_time, r.update_time, r.is_extension, e.available_quantity FROM equipment_reservation r LEFT JOIN equipment e ON r.equipment_id = e.id LEFT JOIN equipment_type et ON e.equipment_type_id = et.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON r.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN sys_user ru ON r.audit_user_id = ru.id WHERE r.equipment_id = #{equipmentId} AND r.reserve_time < DATE_ADD(#{end}, INTERVAL 1 DAY) AND DATE_ADD(r.reserve_time, INTERVAL r.reserve_duration HOUR) > #{start} AND (r.audit_status = 0 OR (r.reserve_status = 1 AND DATE_ADD(r.reserve_time, INTERVAL r.reserve_duration HOUR) > NOW())) ORDER BY r.reserve_time ASC
